experiment: W3 rolling-origin prequential calibration + exit gates

pre_specified_gates.G1: ensemble mean pinball <= unconditional baseline, per universe
pre_specified_gates.G4: CMA central MAE <= sample-mean central MAE at h=5
pre_specified_gates.TEETH: 0.5x-shrunk forecaster must violate the cov80 band

verdict: GATES NOT ALL PASSED -> every engine probability stays UNCALIBRATED_RESEARCH_ESTIMATES; the failing gate(s) name the next work item
